description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof and a minimalist facade. The exterior walls are light-colored, with subtle paneling and a small, recessed entryway visible at the front. The roof has a prominent rectangular cutout or skylight, adding a modern touch to the design. Windows are minimal and integrated into the wall surfaces, contributing to a clean, contemporary appearance. The house sits on a flat, paved base, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and modern architectural elements.
description: A small, modern house with a flat roof, light-colored walls, and minimal windows, set on a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed entryway, light paneling, and a partial glimpse of the interior through the opening.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat roof's overhang and the rectangular skylight, with minimal wall detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, uninterrupted wall surface with no visible entry or windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the roof cutout and the solid side wall, with the entryway not visible.
attribute_entryway_design: recessed entry with a simple door, no porch or decorative elements
